Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lirial]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Lirial is a Territory that reveals, protects, and preserves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Lirial has gray plains and a sky with a dozen moons that shift in patterns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 14''' — Lirial is a power that Leah can call upon through her bracelet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Lirial is a place where the crystal disc resides.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Lirial is a place where power can be stored and called upon via devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Lirial is a Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Leah's Source is located in Lirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Lirial is a Territory with twelve shifting moons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Lirial is a Territory where weather is rare and the sky is usually clear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Lirial is not a combat-oriented Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Lirial is a location or entity that can be reached through a crystal bracelet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 23''' — Lirial is a location that still stands.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — Lirial will likely find a library and start reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Lirial is a Territory containing the Crystal Fields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — Lirial is an entity associated with the recording crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Leah banished her scrying lens back to Lirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Elysian Incarnation has recruited seven Lirial Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Lirial was examining a levitating javelin with silver-white crystals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Lirial is a Territory that is unsuited for battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Lirial is a Territory that Leah has a connection to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Lirial is an Incarnation who shows curiosity and resentment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Lirial contains desolate parts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Lirial is sent ahead to prepare the way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Lirial is a woman of white crystal and silver wire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Lirial cannot be used to scout because there is a Lirial Incarnation on the enemy side.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Lirial raised her hands toward the far side of the building.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Lirial is a trio of stars whirling around in a halo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Lirial wore a dress of silver wire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Lirial used a star-net technique to attack Leah with crystals and white light.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
